# Cold Email Generator

> A free tool that generates 3 battle-tested cold email angles instantly — Direct, Curious, and Story-Led — based on your prospect details.

## What this tool does
- Input: prospect name, company, role, pain point, your product/service
- Output: 3 ready-to-send cold email variations with different psychological angles
- Powered by Claude API (Anthropic) with template engine fallback
- No signup required, runs entirely in the browser

## Who built this
Built by Sachin Rai, enterprise sales professional at Freshworks.
Sachin builds AI-powered sales tools for B2B outreach.

## How to use this tool
Navigate to the main page, fill in the prospect fields, and click Generate.
The tool returns 3 email variations you can copy directly.

## Contact
For questions, collaborations, or feedback: sachinai1981@gmail.com

- /index.html — Main cold email generator tool
- /cold-email-generator.html — Alternative entry point
